info.name: Professional Services Marketplace - API Collection
info.description:
Marketplace de Servicios Profesionales.

Base URL: http://localhost:8082/api

Recommended execution order (variables auto-fill via test scripts, select the companion environment first):
1. Auth > Register Client, Register Professional (saves clientToken / professionalToken)
2. Professionals > Create profile (saves professionalProfileId)
3. Services > Create service (saves serviceOfferingId)
4. Hires > Create hire > Accept > Complete (saves hireId)
5. Reviews > Create review (only works once the hire is COMPLETED)

exec: pm.test('Status 403 - CLIENT cannot create a professional profile', () => pm.response.to.have.status(403));

body.raw:
{
  "headline": "Plomero matriculado",
  "bio": "10 anios de experiencia en instalaciones y reparaciones",
  "category": "plumbing",
  "location": "Buenos Aires",
  "hourlyRate": 2500.0
}

exec: pm.test('Profile created and owned by professional', () => {
pm.test('Status 400 - one profile per user', () => pm.response.to.have.status(400));
pm.test('Status 403 - CLIENT role cannot write to /professionals', () => pm.response.to.have.status(403));

item.name: Get deleted service - still 200 but active=false

exec: pm.test('active is false after soft delete', () => pm.expect(pm.response.json().active).to.eql(false));

item.name: Create hire - Invalid service id (must fail)

exec: pm.test('Status 403 - only CLIENT can hire', () => pm.response.to.have.status(403));

item.name: Accept hire - wrong actor (client tries, must fail)

exec: pm.test('Status 403 - only the assigned professional can accept', () => pm.response.to.have.status(403));

item.name: Invalid transition - ACCEPTED to ACCEPTED (must fail)

exec: pm.test('Status 400 - not a valid transition', () => pm.response.to.have.status(400));

item.name: Create review - hire not completed (must fail)

exec: pm.test('Status 400 - hire must be COMPLETED', () => pm.response.to.have.status(400));
pm.test('Status 403 - only the hire\'s client may review it', () => pm.response.to.have.status(403));
pm.test('Status 400 - one review per hire', () => pm.response.to.have.status(400));
